artifact_summary: Header page for Appendix C of a Hazen PLC Hardware Evaluation report detailing the Howard F. Curren AWTP SCADA system.
artifact_key_elements: Howard F. Curren AWTP SCADA System
Hazen and Reliable Tampa Partners Logos
artifact_blurb: This document serves as the introductory title page for Appendix C within the Hazen PLC Hardware Evaluation report. It specifically addresses the Howard F. Curren Advanced Water Treatment Plant (AWTP) SCADA system and functions as the header for the subsequent 'PLC Evaluation Matrix' section. The page features official branding logos for both Hazen and Reliable Tampa Partners.
